message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "beerocks_cli" as cli
participant "bml_internal" as bml_internal
participant "controller" as controller
participant "controller_db" as controller_db

cli ->> bml_internal: "bml_clear_wifi_credentials <al-mac>"
bml_internal ->> cli: cli_bml::clear_wifi_credentials_caller(args)
cli ->> bml_internal: cli_bml::clear_wifi_credentials(args.stringArgs[0])
bml_internal ->> cli: bml_clear_wifi_credentials(ctx, al-mac.c_str())
cli ->> bml_internal: clear_wifi_credentials(const sMacAddr &al_mac)

bml_internal ->> controller: message_com::send_cmdu(m_sockMaster, ACTION_BML_WIFI_CREDENTIALS_CLEAR_REQUEST)
controller ->> controller_db: clear_bss_info_configuration(const sMacAddr &al_mac)
controller_db ->> controller: message_com::send_cmdu(m_sockMaster, ACTION_BML_WIFI_CREDENTIALS_CLEAR_RESPONSE)
controller ->> bml_internal: message_com::send_cmdu(m_sockMaster, ACTION_BML_WIFI_CREDENTIALS_CLEAR_RESPONSE)
bml_internal ->> controller: message_com::send_cmdu(m_sockMaster, ACTION_BML_WIFI_CREDENTIALS_CLEAR_RESPONSE)

note right of cli
beerocks_cli -c
"bml_clear_wifi_credentials <al-mac>"
end note

note right of bml_internal
bml_internal
end note

note right of controller
controller
end note

note right of controller_db
controller_db
end note

@enduml
